title: Mobile user - Guest, log in, log out - app data changes correctly
scenario: App data (Tenant name, Tenant ID, User ID, Last Connected) updates correctly when switching between Guest login, Lens tenant login, and logout states
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app on the mobile device.
2. From the Home screen, tap the Account icon or navigate to Account settings.
3. Note the current values for Tenant name, Tenant ID, User ID, and Last Connected (expected to be None/Unknown for Guest state).
4. Perform Guest login (if not already in Guest state).
5. Verify that Tenant name, Tenant ID, User ID, and Last Connected fields display None or Unknown.
6. Log in to a Lens tenant using valid Lens credentials.
7. Navigate back to Account settings and verify that Tenant name, Tenant ID, User ID, and Last Connected fields are now populated with the correct values corresponding to the logged-in Lens tenant.
8. Log out from the Lens tenant via the Account settings.
9. Verify that Tenant name, Tenant ID, User ID, and Last Connected fields return to None or Unknown (Guest state).
expected: App data fields update correctly: None/Unknown in Guest state, populated correctly when logged into a Lens tenant, and return to None/Unknown after logout.
